brands.name: Adidas
brands.summary: 阿迪达斯是以“三条纹”建立全球高识别度的运动品牌，兼具专业性能、街头潮流与大众穿着场景。其视觉系统以黑白高对比、强图形符号和利落字形为核心，传递出经典、可靠、充满动能的品牌气质，同时通过联名与文化运营持续强化年轻化表达。

logo.description: 以三叶草与三条纹为核心识别，兼具字标与图形符号的全球统一体系。
logo.construction: 基于简洁字形与强识别图形的组合结构，依靠三条平行斜线与留白形成动态平衡，强化运动感与品牌记忆点。
logo.descriptionEn: Built around the Trefoil and Three Stripes as core identifiers, a globally unified system combining wordmark and graphic symbol.
logo.constructionEn: A combination structure anchored in clean letterforms and highly recognizable graphics, using three parallel diagonal lines and negative space to create dynamic balance — reinforcing athletic energy and brand recall.

typography.heading: 无衬线粗体，偏几何感的品牌定制字形
typography.body: 现代无衬线体，清晰高可读性，适配电商与运动场景
typography.notes: 整体强调力量感、速度感与高识别度，字重对比明确。
typography.headingEn: Bold sans-serif, with a slightly geometric custom brand typeface
typography.bodyEn: Modern sans-serif, optimized for high readability across e-commerce and sport contexts
typography.notesEn: The system emphasizes power, speed, and strong recognition, with clear weight contrast throughout.

photography.lighting: 高对比自然光与硬朗棚拍混合，局部强调轮廓
photography.tone: 利落、真实、能量感、运动感
photography.composition: 中近景人物为主，动态姿态与大留白并存，常用强角度与品牌符号入镜
photography.lightingEn: A mix of high-contrast natural light and hard, directional studio lighting, with targeted emphasis on silhouette
photography.compositionEn: Mid- and close-range portraits featuring dynamic poses alongside generous negative space, frequently incorporating strong camera angles and brand symbols within the frame

brands.toneSummary: 经典运动美学，兼具专业与街头活力。
brands.positioning: 面向全球运动与潮流人群的顶级运动品牌，主张以专业性能连接日常穿着与自我表达。

targetUser.identity: 运动爱好者、城市年轻人、潮流消费者
targetUser.pain: 需要兼顾性能、舒适与风格表达的穿着解决方案
targetUser.scene: 训练、通勤、街头穿搭、休闲社交

sellingPoints: 三条纹与三叶草构成极强品牌识别系统
兼具运动科技、舒适脚感与日常穿搭属性
覆盖跑步、训练、足球、篮球与生活方式全场景
拥有长期运动文化与潮流联名资产
品牌历史深厚，兼具经典性与持续创新能力

brands.name: Apple
brands.summary: “Apple”以极简设计和强生态协同建立全球高端科技心智。其视觉语言高度统一，依托简洁标志、克制色彩与明亮产品影像，持续传递“易用、先进、可信赖”的品牌印象，并通过软硬件整合强化用户粘性与溢价能力。

logo.description: 被咬一口的苹果轮廓，极简且高度识别。
logo.construction: 以单一外轮廓为核心，利用负形切口形成“咬痕”，强调几何简化与符号记忆点。
logo.descriptionEn: A bitten apple silhouette—minimalist and instantly recognizable.
logo.constructionEn: Built around a single outer contour, the negative-space cut forms the signature "bite," emphasizing geometric simplification and strong symbolic memorability.

typography.heading: SF Pro Display
typography.notes: 无衬线、字重层级清晰、字面现代克制，强调高可读性与系统一致性。
typography.notesEn: Sans-serif typefaces with a clear weight hierarchy and a modern, restrained character—prioritizing high readability and system-wide consistency.

photography.lighting: 柔和高质感布光，常见大面积均匀补光与干净高光。
photography.composition: 大留白、产品居中或偏轴对称，突出单品轮廓与材质细节。
photography.lightingEn: Soft, high-quality lighting, typically featuring broad, even fill and clean highlights.
photography.compositionEn: Generous negative space with the product centered or placed off-center along a symmetrical axis, emphasizing silhouette and material detail.

brands.toneSummary: 以极简语言传递高端科技体验。
brands.positioning: 以软硬件一体化体验为核心的高端消费电子与生态品牌。

targetUser.identity: 城市白领、创意工作者、学生及科技爱好者
targetUser.pain: 希望设备简单易用、审美统一、生态联动顺畅
targetUser.scene: 办公、创作、通勤、娱乐与日常生活

sellingPoints: 软硬件与服务生态高度协同
工业设计极简且辨识度强
操作体验统一、上手门槛低
品牌审美稳定，具备强烈身份表达
产品线覆盖多场景，形成生态闭环

brands.name: Apple
brands.summary: Apple 是全球最具影响力的消费电子与科技服务品牌之一，以设计驱动的产品哲学、软硬件一体的生态整合以及极简高端的视觉语言，重新定义了个人计算、移动通讯与数字生活方式。
brands.summaryEn: Apple is one of the world's most influential consumer electronics and technology service brands, redefining personal computing, mobile communication, and digital lifestyles through design-driven product philosophy, integrated hardware-software ecosystems, and a minimalist premium visual language.

logo.description: 一颗被咬掉一口的苹果剪影轮廓，曲线柔和、比例饱满，是全球辨识度最高的品牌符号之一。
logo.descriptionEn: A silhouette of an apple with a single bite taken out, featuring soft curves and a balanced proportion — one of the most recognizable brand symbols on the planet.
logo.construction: 基于正圆与椭圆几何咬合，咬痕弧线打破封闭，象征打破常规与知识索取。
logo.constructionEn: Built from intersecting circles and ellipses; the bite curve intentionally breaks the closed form, symbolizing nonconformity and the pursuit of knowledge.

typography.heading: SF Pro Display / San Francisco
typography.notes: 字重对比鲜明，行高宽松，大量留白；极少使用装饰性字体。
typography.notesEn: Strong weight contrast, generous line-height, abundant whitespace; decorative typefaces are almost never used.

photography.styleZh: 极简产品大片 + 生活方式
photography.lighting: 戏剧化定向光 / 柔和漫射
photography.toneEn: Neutral cool tone, premium and pure
photography.composition: 大量留白、单一焦点、严格居中或三分构图
photography.compositionEn: Generous whitespace, single focal point, strict centering or rule-of-thirds composition

brands.toneSummary: 以极简留白与精准字距，传递冷静而自信的高端科技气质，让产品本身成为唯一主角。
brands.toneSummaryEn: Conveys a calm, confident, premium-tech sensibility through minimal whitespace and precise typography, letting the product itself become the sole protagonist.
brands.positioning: 全球高端消费电子与数字服务领导者，以设计、芯片与生态构筑难以复制的护城河。
brands.positioningEn: Global leader in premium consumer electronics and digital services, building a near-impenetrable moat through design, silicon, and ecosystem.

targetUser.identity: 中高收入专业人士 / 创意工作者 / 注重品质与设计感的城市精英
targetUser.identityZh: 中高收入专业人士 / 创意工作者 / 注重品质与设计感的城市精英
targetUser.pain: 多设备割裂、系统复杂、隐私焦虑，渴望一站式无缝体验
targetUser.painZh: 多设备割裂、系统复杂、隐私焦虑，渴望一站式无缝体验
targetUser.scene: 通勤办公、居家创作、差旅移动、社交分享等高频数字化场景
targetUser.sceneZh: 通勤办公、居家创作、差旅移动、社交分享等高频数字化场景

targetUserEn.identity: Mid-to-high income professionals / Creative workers / Urban elites who value quality and design
targetUserEn.pain: Fragmented devices, complex systems, and privacy anxiety; craving a seamless one-stop experience
targetUserEn.scene: Commuting, office work, home creation, business travel, and social sharing

sellingPoints: 极简设计哲学：每一处圆角、缝隙与材质都经过精密雕琢
自研芯片与软硬件深度整合，性能与能效行业领先
iPhone / Mac / iPad / Watch 生态无缝协同，跨设备体验顺滑
隐私优先的产品理念，将数据主权交还用户
强符号化的品牌资产与高粘性用户社群
sellingPointsEn: Minimalist design philosophy: every corner, seam, and material is precisely crafted
Custom silicon and deep hardware-software integration, leading performance and efficiency
Seamless continuity across iPhone, Mac, iPad, and Watch ecosystems
Privacy-first product philosophy that returns data ownership to users
Highly symbolic brand assets and an exceptionally loyal user community
brandTakeaway: 把首页主色从蓝换成大面积白底留白，让产品成为唯一视觉焦点
采用 8px 栅格系统统一所有间距，提升整体呼吸感与秩序感
产品摄影一律纯白背景 + 单点定向光，杜绝装饰元素干扰
Hero 文案压缩到 3-5 个字，强化短句视觉锤与记忆点
把 Logo 缩小 20% 并增加周边留白，显著提升高级感
brandTakeawayEn: Replace the dominant blue homepage background with expansive white whitespace, letting the product be the sole visual focus
Adopt an 8px grid system to unify all spacing, instantly elevating breathing room and order
Shoot all product photography on pure white backgrounds with single-point directional light, eliminating decorative noise
Compress hero copy to 3-5 words to sharpen the short-phrase visual hammer and memorability
Shrink the Logo by 20% and add surrounding whitespace to significantly amplify premium feel

brands.name: Google
brands.tagline: Don't be evil. Make the world's information universally accessible and useful.
brands.taglineZh: Don't be evil. Make the world's information universally accessible and useful.
brands.summary: Google 是全球最大的搜索引擎与人工智能平台之一,以四大基础色的极简几何标志、Material Design 设计语言和无缝衔接的跨产品生态,把"信息普惠"做成现代互联网的基础设施。

logo.description: 由蓝、红、黄、蓝、绿、红六色组成的 Google 字标,字母基于严谨的几何圆形与拱形结构,圆润、平衡、亲切。
logo.descriptionEn: The Google wordmark composed of blue, red, yellow, blue, green, and red. The letterforms are built on precise geometric circles and arches, rounded, balanced, and approachable.
logo.construction: 以圆和半圆为基本单元,通过精确的几何网格对齐每个字母;G 的弧形缺口与双层结构是识别关键。
logo.constructionEn: Built from circles and half-circles as the basic units, with each letter aligned to a precise geometric grid. The arc notch and double-layer structure of the G are key recognition cues.

typography.heading: Product Sans / Google Sans Display
typography.notes: 无衬线、几何化、字重阶梯清晰;优化屏幕阅读体验,支持 100+ 语言。
typography.notesEn: Sans-serif, geometric, with a clear weight scale; optimized for on-screen readability and supporting 100+ languages.

photography.style: 真实、多元、自然,贴近日常生活
photography.styleEn: Authentic, diverse, and natural, rooted in everyday life
photography.lighting: 自然光为主,高调柔和,避免戏剧化阴影
photography.lightingEn: Natural light as the foundation, bright and soft, avoiding dramatic shadows
photography.composition: 开放式构图,人物真实,弱化摆拍,强调人与产品的自然互动
photography.compositionEn: Open compositions with real people, minimal posing, emphasizing natural interaction between people and product

brands.toneSummary: 谷歌的视觉语调像一个永远穿着彩色T恤的工程师:专业但不冷峻,智能但不疏离,把复杂的技术包装成轻松、可点击的日常体验。
brands.positioning: 全球信息入口与 AI 时代操作系统,以"普惠+智能+开放"构建从搜索到云端的全栈数字底座。

targetUser.identity: 全球互联网用户、学生、开发者、中小企业主与广告主
targetUser.identityZh: 全球互联网用户、学生、开发者、中小企业主与广告主
targetUser.pain: 信息过载、跨工具切换成本高、复杂任务缺乏一体化智能助手
targetUser.painZh: 信息过载、跨工具切换成本高、复杂任务缺乏一体化智能助手
targetUser.scene: 日常搜索、办公协作、出行导航、学习研究、内容消费
targetUser.sceneZh: 日常搜索、办公协作、出行导航、学习研究、内容消费

sellingPoints: 全球领先的信息检索与生成式 AI(Gemini)能力
覆盖搜索、办公、地图、视频、安卓的完整产品生态
以 Material Design 为代表的人本化设计语言
持续创新驱动未来科技普惠与无障碍体验
开放平台连接亿万用户、开发者与广告主

brands.name: Hatch
brands.tagline: Providing modern families with full-cycle sleep solutions from pregnancy to age 12
brands.taglineZh: Providing modern families with full-cycle sleep solutions from pregnancy to age 12
brands.summary: Hatch 创立于硅谷，最初以智能婴儿监护器切入育儿场景，后逐步将产品扩展到 Rest 智能声光机、Restore 成人睡眠灯、孕期到学龄的成长型灯具矩阵。品牌以一套统一的现代极简视觉语言串联 0-12 岁的家庭睡眠场景，用 App 作为情感与控制的中枢，把冷冰冰的智能硬件转译为"陪伴"。其设计哲学强调"少即是多"：鼠尾草绿、陶土橙、奶油白构成的克制色板，与真实家庭生活摄影共同塑造了科技、人文、温柔三者并存的现代育儿品牌气质。

logo.description: 全小写无衬线字标，'a' 字母采用极简几何构造，整体圆润但带科技感
logo.construction: 几何无衬线字形，'a' 内部留白近似圆形，'h' 与 't' 收尾有微小切角，形成柔和却克制的家族标识
logo.descriptionEn: All-lowercase sans-serif wordmark with a minimalist geometric 'a' and an overall rounded yet tech-forward feel
logo.constructionEn: Geometric sans-serif forms; the counter of the 'a' approaches a circle; the 'h' and 't' feature subtle cut terminals, creating a soft yet restrained family mark

typography.heading: 现代几何无衬线（近似 Söhne / Inter 风格）
typography.body: 同系无衬线，字重层级丰富
typography.notes: 全篇以小写为主，字距宽松，营造松弛、亲近的现代感
typography.headingEn: Modern geometric sans-serif (in the style of Söhne / Inter)
typography.bodyEn: Same-family sans-serif with a rich weight hierarchy
typography.notesEn: Predominantly lowercase throughout with generous letter-spacing, creating a relaxed, approachable modern feel

photography.lighting: 自然柔光，多为晨昏室内窗光
photography.composition: 中近景人物+产品共处，背景生活化，不刻意摆拍
photography.lightingEn: Natural soft light, mostly indoor window light at dawn or dusk
photography.compositionEn: Medium and close-up shots of people alongside products, lived-in backgrounds, no forced posing

brands.toneSummary: 把智能硬件做出母亲体温的科技陪伴品牌
brands.positioning: 为 0-12 岁家庭提供以睡眠为核心的智能硬件 + 内容生态，让科技成为日常陪伴

targetUser.identity: 注重生活品质的城市新手父母与年轻家庭
targetUser.pain: 既要科学育儿又要保留自己的生活节奏，缺乏不打扰的睡眠解决方案
targetUser.scene: 哄睡、夜醒、起夜、睡前阅读、远程安抚、孕期助眠

sellingPoints: 全周期产品矩阵：覆盖孕期到 12 岁的灯具与声光产品
App 单一入口：整合白噪音、灯光编程、远程哄睡、睡眠数据
统一设计语言：跨 SKU 保持家族脸谱，配件可迭代不换风格
真实生活摄影：不渲染完美父母，强化"陪伴而非控制"心智
科技藏在温柔里：智能功能不暴露于产品外观，情绪价值优先

brands.name: Nike
brands.summary: 耐克是以“Swoosh”和“Just Do It”构建全球识别的运动品牌。它用极简黑白体系、强动势摄影和明星运动员矩阵，把专业性能、竞技精神与街头时尚合为一体，形成兼具传播力与产品力的超级品牌资产。

logo.description: 以“Swoosh”弧形勾标构成，极简却具强运动张力，常与字标组合使用。
logo.construction: 由单一流线几何构成，依靠负形、速度感曲线与高识别轮廓建立记忆点。
logo.descriptionEn: Built on the Swoosh — a fluid arc mark that is minimalist yet charged with athletic momentum, often paired with the wordmark.
logo.constructionEn: Formed by a single streamlined geometry, building memorability through negative space, speed-driven curves, and a high-recognition silhouette.

typography.heading: 粗体无衬线，偏 Condensed 运动广告字形
typography.body: 现代无衬线体系，接近系统字体与品牌定制字重结合
typography.notes: 标题强调力量与速度，正文保持高可读和商业化传播效率。
typography.headingEn: Bold sans-serif, leaning toward a condensed athletic ad typeface
typography.bodyEn: A modern sans-serif system, blending near-system fonts with brand-customized weights
typography.notesEn: Headlines emphasize power and speed; body copy stays highly legible and built for commercial communication.

photography.lighting: 高对比硬光与均匀柔光并用，强调肌肉线条与产品细节
photography.tone: 高对比、动势强、冷暖并置、真实竞技感
photography.composition: 大特写、低机位、斜线构图与留白并行，突出动作瞬间
photography.lightingEn: High-contrast hard light paired with even soft light, emphasizing muscle definition and product detail
photography.toneEn: High contrast, strong momentum, juxtaposed warm and cool tones, authentic competitive feel
photography.compositionEn: Extreme close-ups, low angles, diagonal compositions alongside negative space, capturing peak action moments

brands.toneSummary: 以极简符号承载高强度运动表达。
brands.positioning: 面向全球运动人群的头部运动品牌，以产品科技与精神激励驱动消费。

targetUser.identity: 专业运动员、健身人群与年轻运动消费群
targetUser.pain: 需要兼顾性能、风格与身份表达，同时渴望被激励和认可
targetUser.scene: 训练、比赛、通勤、街头穿搭与日常运动生活

sellingPoints: Swoosh 与“Just Do It”形成极强品牌联想与传播资产。
覆盖跑步、篮球、训练、生活方式等全场景运动产品线。
长期绑定顶级运动员与赛事资源，强化专业背书。
在材料、缓震、支撑与轻量化上持续迭代产品科技。
把运动表现转译为街头时尚，兼顾功能与审美。

brands.name: Nintendo
brands.summary: 从京都一家花札作坊到全球游戏霸主，任天堂用 130 多年时间只做了一件事：让游戏回归"玩"本身。Switch 的混合形态打破了主机与掌机的边界，Wii 的体感重新定义了大人的客厅，而马里奥、林克、皮卡丘组成的 IP 宇宙则成为几代人共同的童年记忆。它的视觉语言从不是参数堆砌，而是用最克制的红白配色、最圆润的无衬线字体，传递一种"全年龄友好"的温度。

logo.description: 白色圆润无衬线字"Nintendo"嵌入红色椭圆胶囊框
logo.construction: 红底胶囊是主图形，白色字形作为负空间嵌入，胶囊弧度与字形圆角严格呼应，形成"圆中圆"的几何闭环
logo.descriptionEn: Rounded white sans-serif wordmark 'Nintendo' set inside a red oval capsule
logo.constructionEn: The red capsule is the primary shape, with the white letterform embedded as negative space; the capsule's curvature echoes the letterforms' rounded geometry, creating a closed 'circle within a circle' system

typography.heading: Nintendo 自有定制圆体（Nintendo Sans 系，推测为 Futura/Round Gothic 改良）
typography.body: Nintendo Sans / Noto Sans 系列
typography.notes: 所有字形弧度与红胶囊呼应，标题禁止使用衬线与极细字形
typography.headingEn: Nintendo's custom rounded typeface (Nintendo Sans family, likely a Futura/Round Gothic refinement)
typography.notesEn: All letterform curvature echoes the red capsule; serif and ultra-thin weights are prohibited for headlines

photography.lighting: 高亮柔光、整体曝光偏亮，几乎不见硬阴影
photography.composition: 手部特写 + 半身人物为主，主体永远居中，背景留出品牌色块
photography.lightingEn: Bright, soft, overall high-exposure lighting with virtually no hard shadows
photography.compositionEn: Hand close-ups and half-body subjects, always centered, with brand-color blocks reserved in the background

brands.toneSummary: 童趣与匠心并重，让游戏回归家庭与欢乐
brands.positioning: 以独创的硬件 + 第一方 IP，为全年龄段创造笑容与同屏时光

targetUser.identity: 家庭玩家、核心粉丝、怀旧青年
targetUser.pain: 想要不复杂、不暴力、可与家人共享的高品质娱乐
targetUser.scene: 客厅同屏、旅途掌机、朋友聚会

sellingPoints: 马里奥/塞尔达/宝可梦构成的独家 IP 宇宙
Switch 主机 + 掌机混合形态，场景无缝切换
第一方工作室出品，质量与口碑稳定
全家可玩的内容分级策略，覆盖最广人群
百年企业沉淀的工艺感与品牌信任

brands.name: Oura
brands.tagline: One ring. Your body, quantified around the clock.
brands.taglineZh: One ring. Your body, quantified around the clock.
brands.summary: Oura 由芬兰奥卢的一群科学家与设计师在 2013 年创立，2018 年正式推出消费级 Oura Ring。品牌以"无屏幕 + 单指环"形态切入可穿戴市场，用 Readiness Score、睡眠分期、HRV 等医疗级指标取代步数与卡路里的浅层叙事，将产品定位为"可佩戴的健康数据伙伴"。视觉上坚持北欧极简与珠宝级材质，目标是高知高压职业人群的长期健康优化。

logo.description: 全小写无衬线字标 "oura"，O 字母保持正圆
logo.construction: 几何正圆 O + 简洁小写字母，弱化装饰，靠负空间和字怀传递冷静感
logo.descriptionEn: All-lowercase sans-serif wordmark 'oura', with the O kept as a perfect circle
logo.constructionEn: Geometric perfect-circle O paired with simple lowercase letterforms, minimal ornamentation—letting negative space and counters carry the cool restraint

typography.heading: 自研无衬线，接近 Söhne / GT America 风格，字怀宽、字重对比强
typography.body: 同一字族细体，强调留白与节奏
typography.notes: 全大写小标题配合大字号行距，关键词加粗形成"呼吸感节奏"
typography.headingEn: Custom sans-serif in the spirit of Söhne / GT America, with wide counters and strong weight contrast
typography.bodyEn: Thin weights from the same family, emphasizing whitespace and pacing
typography.notesEn: All-caps subheads paired with generous line-height on large sizes; key terms bolded to create a breathing rhythm

photography.lighting: 柔和自然光、低对比度，偶用金色时段
photography.tone: 暖中性、低饱和、米杏与沙色主导
photography.composition: 大量负空间、近景手部与指环特写，弱化人脸
photography.lightingEn: Soft natural light, low contrast, with occasional golden-hour
photography.toneEn: Warm-neutral, low saturation, dominated by beige and sand
photography.compositionEn: Generous negative space, close-ups of hands and the ring, with faces deliberately downplayed

brands.toneSummary: 以北欧极简与珠宝质感传递医学级的健康洞察
brands.positioning: 无屏幕全天候的健康数据伙伴，专为追求长期身心优化的精英用户打造

targetUser.identity: 高知职业人 / 睡眠优化者 / 生物黑客
targetUser.pain: 手表干扰睡眠、难以量化恢复状态、想要深度健康洞察
targetUser.scene: 夜间睡眠监测、高压工作后的恢复评估、晨间例行打卡

sellingPoints: 无屏幕单指环形态，整夜佩戴无感
睡眠分期与 Readiness Score 接近医学级精度
7 天超长续航，充电间隙极短
钛金属 + 类钻镀层，珠宝级材质 SKU
数据在本地+云端双端加密，强调隐私

brands.name: Oura
brands.tagline: Know your body. Own your day.
brands.summary: Oura 是一家芬兰健康科技公司，以其 Oura Ring 智能戒指闻名——这是一枚 24 小时不间断监测睡眠、恢复度、活动、心率与体温的精致指环。Oura 立足于珠宝级设计与临床级生物数据的交汇点，将连续的生理信号转化为每日个性化的睡眠、压力与恢复指导，把"身体数据"包装成可以佩戴的极简单品。
brands.summaryEn: Oura is a Finnish health technology company best known for the Oura Ring, a sleek smart ring that tracks sleep, readiness, activity, heart rate, and body temperature around the clock. Positioned at the intersection of jewelry-grade design and clinical-grade biometrics, Oura turns continuous physiological data into personalized daily guidance for sleep, stress, and recovery.

logo.description: 圆润几何感的「ouraring」小写字标，配以完整圆环 O 形主图形，整体如一枚戒指。
logo.descriptionEn: A rounded, geometric 'ouraring' wordmark in lowercase paired with a complete circular O mark that reads as a ring.
logo.construction: 圆形 O 作为主图形独立使用，下方是细字距小写字标；无装饰性衬线。
logo.constructionEn: The circular O is used as a standalone mark, with a light-weight, loosely-tracked lowercase wordmark beneath it; no decorative serifs.

typography.heading: 几何无衬线，圆润，权重偏轻至中等
typography.body: 人文无衬线，等高 x-height，行高宽松
typography.bodyEn: Humanist sans-serif with even x-height and generous line height
typography.notes: 强调字距与留白，避免粗黑体与衬线；标题与正文靠空间分级而非字重。
typography.notesEn: Lean on letter spacing and white space; avoid bold serifs and heavy weights—use space, not weight, to build hierarchy.

photography.style: 极简静物，皮肤与材质特写
photography.styleEn: Minimalist still-life, skin and material close-ups
photography.composition: 居中构图、大量负空间，俯拍与平视结合
photography.compositionEn: Centered composition with heavy negative space, mixing flat-lay and eye-level frames

brands.toneSummary: Oura 的视觉与文案始终保持斯堪的纳维亚式的冷静克制，以大量留白、低饱和与精确数据建立信任感，避免情绪化煽动与过度营销。
brands.toneSummaryEn: Oura's visual and verbal language stays Nordic-cool and restrained, building trust through white space, muted color, and precise data rather than emotional storytelling or hard-sell tactics.
brands.positioning: 为追求长期健康表现的知识型用户，提供可穿戴的临床级生理监测与每日恢复指导。
brands.positioningEn: Providing wearable, clinical-grade biometric monitoring and daily readiness guidance for knowledge-driven users pursuing long-term health performance.

targetUser.identity: 高收入健康优化者、biohacker、企业高管与创意从业者
targetUser.identityZh: 高收入健康优化者、biohacker、企业高管与创意从业者
targetUser.pain: 手腕空间已被占满，又渴望量化、长期追踪自身健康数据
targetUser.painZh: 手腕空间已被占满，又渴望量化、长期追踪自身健康数据
targetUser.scene: 睡前佩戴监测睡眠与恢复，运动与差旅中持续读取身体信号
targetUser.sceneZh: 睡前佩戴监测睡眠与恢复，运动与差旅中持续读取身体信号

targetUserEn.identity: High-income health optimizers, biohackers, executives, and creative professionals
targetUserEn.pain: Wrist is already full, yet they want quantified, long-term tracking of their own health data
targetUserEn.scene: Worn overnight to monitor sleep and recovery, kept on during workouts and travel to read body signals continuously

sellingPoints: 指环形态的连续生理监测（HRV、体温、心率、呼吸）
基于睡眠 + 活动 + 恢复度三轴的每日 Readiness 评分
钛金属 + DLC 镀层的珠宝级外观与全天候佩戴舒适度
App 内长时序趋势视图与女性周期、孕期、病后追踪
8 天以上电池续航与无屏幕、无震动的低干扰佩戴
sellingPointsEn: Continuous biometric monitoring in a ring form factor (HRV, temperature, heart rate, respiration)
Daily Readiness score driven by sleep, activity, and recovery axes
Jewelry-grade titanium + DLC-coated build for all-day comfort
Long-term trend views plus cycle, pregnancy, and illness tracking inside the app
8+ day battery life with screen-free, vibration-light wear
brandTakeaway: 把首屏主色饱和度降到 5% 以内，主图换成静物特写。
在 app 顶部固定一张「今日一指标」卡片。
用 7 天柱状图替代传统 dashboard 装饰墙。
将订阅页面分两栏：洞察 vs 行动建议。
把产品展示从腕表场景切换到晨间床头柜。
brandTakeawayEn: Drop first-screen saturation below 5% and swap the hero image for a tactile still-life.
Pin a single "metric of the day" card at the very top of the app.
Replace dashboard decorative charts with a clean 7-day bar view.
Split the membership page into Insights vs. Action columns.
Move product photography from wrist shots to the bedside table at dawn.

brands.name: PlayStation
brands.summary: PlayStation 是索尼旗下的全球主机游戏品牌，以强烈的视觉识别、丰富独占内容与稳定硬件性能建立行业标杆。它既是硬核玩家的娱乐入口，也是连接游戏、影音与社交体验的数字平台，品牌气质偏科技、沉浸、年轻且极具未来感。

logo.description: 由红黄蓝绿四色立体“PS”字标与简洁英文名共同构成，识别度极强。
logo.construction: 以几何切面和负形叠压形成“P/S”错视结构，强调体块、透视和色彩分层。
logo.descriptionEn: Composed of a three-dimensional 'PS' wordmark in red, yellow, blue, and green, paired with a clean English logotype, delivering exceptional recognizability.
logo.constructionEn: Uses geometric facets and negative-space layering to create an optical 'P/S' illusion structure, emphasizing volumetric blocks, perspective, and color stratification.

typography.heading: 无衬线体，偏几何感，接近定制化品牌字形
typography.body: 现代无衬线系统字体，常见于数字产品界面
typography.notes: 整体呈现科技、简洁、国际化，标题更强调力量感与空间感。
typography.headingEn: Sans-serif, geometric in feel, close to a customized brand typeface
typography.bodyEn: Modern sans-serif system fonts, commonly seen in digital product interfaces
typography.notesEn: The overall feel is tech-driven, clean, and international, with headings emphasizing strength and spatial presence.

photography.lighting: 高对比冷光，辅以局部霓虹或屏幕发光
photography.composition: 中心构图与大留白并存，常用机身特写、游戏场景联动和动态视觉切片
photography.lightingEn: High-contrast cool light, accented with localized neon or screen-glow effects
photography.compositionEn: Centered framing balanced with generous negative space, frequently featuring product close-ups, in-game scene integration, and dynamic visual slices

brands.toneSummary: 以科技驱动沉浸娱乐，兼具未来感与潮流识别。
brands.positioning: 全球领先的互动娱乐游戏平台，连接主机、内容与玩家生态。

targetUser.identity: 核心游戏玩家、主机用户、数字娱乐消费者
targetUser.pain: 追求高质量游戏体验、沉浸式性能与独占内容
targetUser.scene: 居家主机娱乐、在线联机、内容消费与社交分享

sellingPoints: 强大的主机性能与稳定的图形表现
丰富的独占游戏与第一方内容生态
成熟的在线联机与数字商店体系
标志性的品牌符号与跨代际认知
将游戏、影视、社交娱乐融为一体

brands.name: Google
brands.tagline: Organize the world's information and make it universally accessible and useful.
brands.summary: Google 由 Larry Page 与 Sergey Brin 于 1998 年在加州创立，最初只是一个名为 BackRub 的学术搜索引擎项目。如今它已成长为全球最大的科技公司之一，核心产品包括搜索、Gmail、YouTube、Android、Chrome、Maps、Cloud 和 AI（Gemini / Bard）。其品牌以四色 Logo、极简 sans-serif 字体与"做正确的事"价值观闻名，把"人人可访问的全球信息"作为长期使命。

logo.description: 由四个字母 G-o-o-g-l-e 组成，每个字母对应一种主色（蓝、红、黄、蓝、绿、红），笔画末端做圆切处理，整体圆润、亲和、童趣与现代并存。
logo.descriptionEn: A five-letter wordmark spelling G-o-o-g-l-e, each letter colored with one of four primaries (blue, red, yellow, blue, green, red). Strokes end in soft cuts, balancing friendliness, playfulness and modernity.
logo.construction: 字母基于几何圆与直线网格定制，几何中心对齐；四色分布遵循固定顺序（蓝-红-黄-蓝-绿-红），禁止乱序或改色。
logo.constructionEn: Letters are custom-built on a geometric grid of circles and straight strokes with shared centers. The color sequence (blue-red-yellow-blue-green-red) is fixed and must never be reordered.

typography.heading: Product Sans / Google Sans Display
typography.body: Google Sans Text / Roboto / Roboto Flex
typography.bodyEn: Google Sans Text / Roboto / Roboto Flex
typography.notes: 标题偏几何 sans、字面宽、重几何圆；正文用更紧凑、人机工学优化的 Roboto 系列，强调屏幕可读性。
typography.notesEn: Headings use a geometric sans with wide apertures and rounded geometry; body uses Roboto, a denser screen-optimized family built for long reading sessions.

photography.style: 明亮、高饱和、真实生活场景；产品页以纯净 UI 与渲染图为主
photography.styleEn: Bright, high-saturation real-life scenes; product pages rely on clean UI screenshots and crisp 3D renders
photography.lighting: 自然柔光为主，常带窗外天光，阴影柔和不压抑
photography.lightingEn: Soft natural daylight with window-like key light; gentle, non-oppressive shadows
photography.tone: 乐观、温暖、普惠；人群多元、肤色多样、设备多样
photography.toneEn: Optimistic, warm, inclusive; visibly diverse cast, skin tones and devices
photography.composition: 人物居中或三分构图，留白充足，主体清晰；产品图常用居中英雄式构图
photography.compositionEn: Centered or rule-of-thirds framing with generous negative space and a clear subject; product shots favor a centered hero composition

brands.toneSummary: 谷歌对外的语气像一个永远好奇、耐心又可靠的朋友：把复杂的技术讲得人话化，用四色 logo 和节日 doodle 保持俏皮，但底层始终保持搜索巨头该有的权威与克制。
brands.positioning: 全球默认的搜索引擎与日常数字基础设施，把"让信息对每个人都有用"作为长期承诺，在 AI 时代继续以 Gemini 把搜索升级为对话式智能助手。

targetUser.age: 18-55 岁，覆盖学生、白领、创作者与企业用户
targetUser.ageZh: 18-55 岁，覆盖学生、白领、创作者与企业用户
targetUser.identity: 全球互联网用户；学生、研究者、营销人、开发者、普通家庭
targetUser.identityZh: 全球互联网用户；学生、研究者、营销人、开发者、普通家庭
targetUser.pain: 想快速找到可靠答案，不想被广告或低质内容淹没；跨设备同步日常任务
targetUser.painZh: 想快速找到可靠答案，不想被广告或低质内容淹没；跨设备同步日常任务
targetUser.scene: 每天无数次：搜索、写邮件、导航、翻译、看视频、写文档、问 AI
targetUser.sceneZh: 每天无数次：搜索、写邮件、导航、翻译、看视频、写文档、问 AI

sellingPoints: 全球第一搜索引擎，索引万亿级网页，结果秒级返回
Gemini AI 把搜索升级为对话式智能助手，可直接生成总结与方案
一站式生态：Search / Gmail / Maps / YouTube / Drive / Android 跨设备无缝协同
Material You 与四色品牌系统让产品既统一又充满活力
持续投入普惠：免费工具、翻译、开放 Android、Pixel 硬件与开发者 API

brands.name: hatch
brands.summary: hatch 是一个围绕“破壳新生”概念构建的现代生活方式品牌。它以温暖米白与鼠尾草绿为主色，圆润字体与柔和摄影贯穿全触点，在理性极简与感性陪伴之间寻找平衡，目标是成为都市青年日常成长中安静而可靠的陪伴者。

logo.description: 全小写无衬线字标“hatch”，字怀留白克制，字母 a 顶部开口呼应破壳意象。
logo.descriptionEn: A fully lowercase sans-serif wordmark 'hatch' with restrained counters; the open top of the 'a' echoes a hatching shell.
logo.construction: 基于单圆弧与垂直笔画构建，x-height 偏大提升屏幕可读性，字母 a 采用双层结构保留呼吸感。
logo.constructionEn: Built on a single arc and vertical strokes; an oversized x-height boosts screen legibility, and a double-storey 'a' preserves breathing room.

typography.heading: 圆润无衬线：Nunito Rounded / Quicksand
typography.body: 现代无衬线：Inter / 思源黑体（Noto Sans SC）
typography.notes: 字重控制在 Regular 与 Bold 两级，避免使用斜体；行高 1.6-1.75 保证长文可读性。
typography.notesEn: Stick to Regular and Bold weights; avoid italics; set line-height between 1.6 and 1.75 to ensure long-form readability.

photography.lighting: 侧逆光模拟破晓或清晨窗光，避免硬阴影与高对比
photography.lightingEn: Side backlight simulating dawn or morning window light; avoid hard shadows and high contrast
photography.tone: 暖米白基调，肤色柔和不饱和，整体低对比
photography.toneEn: Warm cream undertone; soft, desaturated skin tones; overall low contrast
photography.composition: 大量留白 + 微距特写，主体居中或偏左三分之一
photography.compositionEn: Generous negative space + macro close-ups; subjects centered or on the left-third rule

brands.toneSummary: 以“破壳”这一情感隐喻为内核，在现代极简框架中注入柔和生命力，整体氛围低饱和、低噪音、有人情味。
brands.positioning: 面向都市年轻人的孵化型生活方式品牌：以“破壳”为核心隐喻，把科技工具与情绪温度结合，帮助用户在日常缝隙中发现自我成长的微小瞬间。

targetUser.identity: Urban young creators and early-career professionals seeking quiet self-growth
targetUser.identityZh: 寻求安静自我成长的都市青年创作者与早期职场人
targetUser.pain: 渴望成长却害怕改变，希望被温柔陪伴而非被催促
targetUser.painZh: 想要成长又怕改变，渴望被温柔陪伴而非被催促
targetUser.scene: Morning commute, midday solitude, and evening journaling
targetUser.sceneZh: 晨间通勤、午休独处、晚间复盘

sellingPoints: 以“破壳新生”为情感锚点，区别于冷感的纯科技品牌。
全小写无衬线 logo 强化亲切感与互联网原生基因。
米白 + 鼠尾草绿主色构建自然疗愈的视觉氛围。
圆润字体与柔光摄影贯穿所有触点，降低决策门槛。
暖黄仅作关键行动点点缀，引导转化而不打扰。
